overall.description: Static cinematic shot of a medieval great hall from a video game, featuring gothic architecture with floating candles, long dining tables, and students in robes seated eating. The warm candlelight mixes with natural light from tall arched windows to illuminate the stone interior.

segments.scene_description: A static view of a grand medieval dining hall with gothic architecture. Floating candles illuminate the space above long wooden tables where students sit eating. Stone pillars line both sides of the marble floor, leading toward an ornate doorway at the far end, with stained glass windows providing additional light.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, cinematic view of a grand medieval dining hall that emphasizes the scale and atmosphere of its gothic architecture. It begins by capturing the vastness of the space, where floating candles cast a warm glow over long wooden tables filled with students. The perspective then draws the eye along the marble floor, guided by the rhythmic placement of massive stone pillars lining the hall. This visual path leads toward an ornate doorway at the far end, as the warm candlelight blends with the colorful light filtering through distant stained glass windows.
